strengths: 20 years of continuous software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — exceeds the 15-year minimum with genuine breadth
Active AI/agent infrastructure work at re:cinq (MCP code generators, agentic workflows) combined with open-source platform building demonstrates hands-on builder fluency
Demonstrated entrepreneurial track record via GISCollective and community knowledge-sharing through workshops and conference talks shows the internal/external inspiration the role requires
concerns: AI expertise is very recent (April 2025) with no prior ML/AI product history — the role requires recognized expertise and demonstrated AI-powered platforms, which the resume does not support at that depth
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no cloud architecture or strategy credentials; both are listed as preferred qualifications and are central to the role's advisory responsibilities

Titles and scope across the career are individual contributor/senior-level rather than Director-level IC; no evidence of advising strategic customers or partners at the scale this principal role demands
response.justification: Bogdan is a highly capable, polyglot engineer with genuine entrepreneurial instincts and a long track record of shipping real systems, but the Principal Engineer — AI Strategy role is a Director-level position requiring deep, recognized AI expertise and experience advising strategic customers at scale — areas where the resume shows limited evidence. His AI work is nascent, his titles have consistently been individual contributor senior-level, and he holds no advanced degree in a relevant field. He could be a strong candidate for a senior full-stack or platform engineering role, but the strategic AI advisory scope of this position represents a significant stretch from his current profile.
